narrative_beat: Jerusalem com rastros e Tel Aviv P&B

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: a wide low-angle night sky filled with 300 missile and drone trails crossing diagonally
subject.focal_point: the golden Jerusalem dome with orange flame reflections in foreground
subject.secondary: Background Tel Aviv skyline in monochrome; trails glow crimson-gold

environment.time_of_day: night of first direct Iranian strike

composition.rule: rule of thirds trails across upper half
composition.foreground: dome and trails in vivid gold-crimson

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, crimson saturation, anamorphic flare

mood.emotion: first direct Iranian strike on Israel

symbolism.secondary: trails as first blows of peace removal

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
